definition: Three identifiable pathways could end the cycle: (a) rate shock via inflation resurgence/fiscal sustainability, (b) AI earnings disappointment cascading through concentration and Kalecki channels, (c) credit event propagating through 2-6 month credit-equity lead. Each has distinct cross-asset signatures monitorable in real time.
evidence: Three drawdown archetypes: recessionary median -34%, valuation-compression median -22%, structural/systemic median -49%
Three-condition checklist: fiscal impulse, credit impulse, Minsky fragility
Current status: condition 3 met, condition 2 approaching threshold, condition 1 intact
Specific probability assignments criticized as false precision
open_questions: Whether pathways interact or are independent
Whether fiscal floor can prevent credit event transmission
Timing of AI earnings test vs credit cycle
